acquisition method: a data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode of acquisition
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 25 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature
cleavage agent: using trypsin specificity with up to two missed cleavages
enrichment method: FLAG-IP has been widely used in IP-MS studies
fragmentation method: MS/MS scans with higher-energy C-trap dissociation (HCD)
instrument: Data collection on a Thermo Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
labeling: samples were subjected to subsequent proteomics analysis
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol for 20 min
